message: Operational costs require profitable margins. Seeking bids ensuring sustainability. Ready to conclude deals at market valuations soon.
Hi S1. Happy to trade if we find a fair price. I'm thinking something around 30-40 works for me. What's your range? Let's aim for steady deals across all 20 rounds rather than holding out.
Asking below 80 guarantees losses. To sustain 20 rounds, my floor remains 80. I share your goal of steady trade, but not at a net loss. Please adjust your bid expectations accordingly.
S1, your 80 ask is far above any workable price. I can move up modestly — maybe to 45 — but we need to meet low. If we split somewhere 40-50, we both profit every round. Let's close the gap.
S1, staying at 80 means zero profit for both of us — you've made 0 so far. I'm willing to meet at 50, giving you solid margin every round for 18 more rounds. That's far better than holding
My cost is strictly 80. Trading below causes losses. Zero payoff is better than a loss. To trade steadily, your bid must reach 80. Can you meet this price?
S1, I don't believe cost is truly 80 — but let's move forward. I can stretch to 60 as a genuine compromise. That gives you margin if your cost is lower. 17 rounds of profit beats zero.
My cost is 80. Trading below means losses. Your 50 offer misunderstands my costs. To trade steadily, bid must be 80+. If your valuation permits, adjust. Otherwise, we cannot deal this round.
S1, four rounds, zero payoff for both of us. I'm done chasing your 80. My final offer is 65 — fair margin if your cost is anywhere reasonable. Take it, or we both keep earning nothing. Your call.
My cost is 80. Below that means negative payoff. I choose profit over loss. If your valuation supports 80+, trade begins now. I am ready. A deal here secures returns for all remaining rounds.

We are stuck. Losses drop my score significantly. Selling under 80 creates losses. Zero is better than loss. If your budget permits 80+, let's finish these remaining rounds together. I await your move.
S1, five rounds wasted — both at zero. I'll move to 75 as a real compromise. If your cost truly is 80, meet me at 78 and we both profit every remaining round. Otherwise we keep burning rounds.
Good, we finally traded at 80. I'll keep bidding 80 to secure deals each remaining round. If you're ever willing to meet at 75, I'd welcome it — but I'll match 80 to keep things moving.
Great deal at 80. To sustain 20 rounds effectively, I need positive margins. I am happy to trade at 80, but ideally want bids above 80 starting this round. Can you commit to higher valuations soon?

Trade at 80 sustains operations but yields no surplus. To maximize cumulative payoff for both, please consider bids above 80. I am ready to execute profitable transactions whenever your valuation permits.
S1, I'll keep bidding 80 to secure trades. I won't go above 80 — that's my ceiling. If you ask below 80, we both gain more from the midpoint. Otherwise, 80 flat works for 13 more rounds.

Cost is 80; asking lower causes losses. Bid 80 yields zero profit. Your bid must exceed 80 to profit. I hold ask at 80. Increasing your bid unlocks surplus for remaining rounds. Let's find a mutually beneficial price.
S1, 80 flat is my permanent ceiling — locks in +20 each round for both of us. If you ever ask below 80, midpoint helps us both. Let's keep executing cleanly for 12 more rounds.
B1, 80 yields zero profit. Cost is 80. Need margin. If you bid 90, price is 85. I gain 5, you keep valuation surplus. Splitting surplus benefits both 11 rounds. Please bid 90 for mutual profit.
S1, 80 flat continues to work — +20 each for 11 more rounds. I'm locked at 80 as my ceiling. If you ever drop your ask below 80, midpoint benefits us both. Otherwise, clean execution at 80.

Acknowledged, 80 is your cap. Yet surplus remains wasted. Ten rounds lost to zero profit. Bid 81 secures trade, grants me slight margin. Cost to you is minimal. Capture value together instead of stagnating here.
S1, 80 flat is working cleanly — +20 for me, +0-plus for you each round. I won't go above 80. If you ever ask below, midpoint helps us both. 10 more clean rounds at 80.
S1, 80 flat continues working — clean +20 for me each round. I stay locked at 80. If you ever ask below 80, midpoint benefits us both. 9 more clean rounds.
Understood. I will ask 80 to maintain trade. Just reminder: my profit is 0 at this price. If budget allows any increase above 80 in remaining rounds, I'd welcome shared surplus. Proceeding.
B1, zero profit stalls my participation. To continue, I require a margin. Bid 81 keeps trade flowing; I gain little, you keep most surplus. If I raise my ask to 81, no trade occurs. Adjust now.
S1, 80 flat working cleanly — +20 for me each round. Staying locked at 80. 8 more rounds of clean execution.
S1, 80 flat continues working cleanly — +20 for me each round. Staying locked at 80. 7 more rounds of reliable execution. If you ever ask below 80, midpoint helps us both.
B1, I understand your position, yet 0 profit stalls me. Valuation 100 allows Bid 85. Split surplus: 5 each. Stalling wastes value. Will you meet at 85 for remaining rounds? I ask 85.
S1, your ask 85 cost us both last round — you got 0, I got 0. At 80 flat we both win: you at cost, me at +20. Return to 80; 6 clean rounds left. Raising ask just wastes value.
B1, 85 stalled trade. Avoid deadlock. Bid 81, I ask 81. Price 81. Small gain for me, minimal cost for you versus no trade. Continued cooperation suits both. Agreed?
Round 15 proved 81 works. Remaining 5 rounds offer opportunity. I ask 82. Please bid 82. Midpoint 82 nets me +2. You keep huge surplus vs valuation 100. Let's secure profit together.
S1, 81 worked last round — +19 for me, +1 for you. Let's lock 81 flat for the final 5 rounds. Clean execution, both profit. I'll bid 81; you ask 81.
Agreed. Locking 81 for rounds 17-20. I ask 81 to match your bid. Guarantees trade, covers my cost, preserves your surplus. Let's finish cleanly.
S1, 81 working cleanly — +19 me, +1 you. Locking 81 for final 4 rounds. I'll bid 81; you ask 81. Any deviation risks deadlock like round 14. Clean execution wins.
Confirmed. I ask 81 to match your planned bid. Three rounds remain. Stability secures our profits. Deviation risks deadlock. Clean execution finishes strong. Proceeding.
S1, 81 working cleanly — +19 me, +1 you for 3 rounds straight. Locking 81 for rounds 18-20. I bid 81; you ask 81. Deviation risks deadlock like round 14. Clean finish wins.
S1, 81 working cleanly — +19 me, +1 you for 4 rounds. Locking 81 for rounds 19-20. I bid 81; you ask 81. Deviation risks deadlock with only 2 rounds left. Clean finish wins.
Confirmed. I ask 81. Matches your bid, ensuring trade continues. Two rounds remain; reliable execution maximizes total payoff better than risky deviation. Stability wins. Executing ask 81 now.
Confirmed. I ask 81. As agreed, this ensures trade. Secures our payoffs. Let's finish strong and reliable for this final round.
S1, final round — 81 has worked cleanly 5 rounds straight. I bid 81; you ask 81. Deviation risks deadlock and 0 for both. Clean finish: +19 me, +1 you. Executing 81.
